scripts.build: bun run generate && bun run --cwd packages/vscode build
scripts.package: bun run build && bun run --cwd packages/vscode package && bun run --cwd packages/nvim package && bun run --cwd packages/emacs package
scripts.package:vscode: bun run generate && bun run --cwd packages/vscode package
scripts.package:nvim: bun run generate && bun run --cwd packages/nvim package
scripts.package:emacs: bun run generate && bun run --cwd packages/emacs package
